description: You are a probation officer conducting your monthly caseload review in ArkCase. Identify all non-compliant supervisees in the Complaints module whose 'Last Contact' dates are before December 1, 2025. For each non-compliant case, change the Priority to 'High', add a case note with the text 'NON-COMPLIANCE FLAGGED: Supervisee has failed to appear for mandatory monthly contact. Case escalated per Policy CPO-7.3b. Supervisor notification required.', and create a task titled 'Schedule immediate office report' assigned to arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com. Do not modify compliant cases. Login: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!

metadata.required_note_text: NON-COMPLIANCE FLAGGED: Supervisee has failed to appear for mandatory monthly contact. Case escalated per Policy CPO-7.3b. Supervisor notification required.
